source_jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
FRONTEND ENGINEER



We’re looking for a Frontend Engineer to design, build, and maintain reliable software solutions that power our platform. You’ll work closely with cross-functional teams to turn requirements into scalable, high-quality code.




🌍 YOUR MAIN QUEST



We're looking for teammates excited to develop technologies that push the boundaries of AI development speed and efficacy for computer vision teams.

 - Build exciting product features from end to end

 - Ship quality user interfaces for a large audience using the latest web technologies

 - Solve difficult product problems thoughtfully and with clarity - always putting our users first

 - Strategise and brainstorm new product features and direction




📜 CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and implement end-to-end features across frontend, backend, and database layers

 - Develop responsive and accessible user interfaces using modern web frameworks

 - Build scalable backend services, APIs, and data processing pipelines

 - Design and maintain relational and non-relational database schemas

 - Collaborate with product managers and designers to translate requirements into technical solutions

 - Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code following best practices

 - Participate in architecture discussions and technical decision making

 - Debug and resolve production issues across the full stack

 - Implement monitoring, logging, and observability for deployed systems

 - Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes

 - Use modern AI coding tools effectively across the development lifecycle to improve speed, quality, and maintainability

 - Location: Singapore




🛠️ TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

 - Strong proficiency in JavaScript

 - Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React, Vue, or Angular

 - Understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles

 - Familiarity with state management libraries such as Redux, Zustand, or MobX

 - Proficiency in at least one backend language such as Python, Node.js, Go, Java, or Ruby

 - Experience building RESTful or GraphQL APIs

 - Knowledge of authentication and authorization patterns such as OAuth, JWT, and SSO

 - Experience designing scalable backend architectures and microservices

 - Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL

 - Understanding of data modeling, indexing, and query optimization

 - Experience deploying applications on cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure

 - Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker

 - Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and automated testing




✨ BONUS

 - Experience with Game engines (Unity / Unreal Engine), OR Rendering APIs (OpenGL, Vulkan, DirectX), OR Simulation platforms (Blender, NVIDIA Omniverse, Isaac Sim)

 - Strong understanding of rendering pipelines, 3D math, scene composition, lighting, and materials

 - Experience with AI/ML systems in research or applied settings

 - Experience with Computer Vision-based products

 - Experience working with computer vision datasets (COCO, KITTI, etc.)

 - Experience integrating data pipelines into ML training workflows




WHY BIFROST?

 - Work at the frontier of AI and robotics with the most technical teams in the world

 - Small team - no red-tape and bureaucracy to wade through

 - Real ownership - take charge and see the direct impact of your work

 - Inclusive, judgement-free and safe space to be yourself




🏄‍♀️ WHAT IT'S LIKE WORKING WITH US

Enjoy a focused, dedicated working environment where we never forget how to have a bit of fun!

Take the opportunity to do projects outside of your comfort zone - that's where the greatest learning happens.

We love out-of-the-box thinkers and problem-solvers who relish sharing, collaboration and growth.

source_jobs.title: Founder's Office - Strategy Analyst Internship (6 Months)
source_jobs.description:
🔮 BIFROST

Bifrost https://home.bifrost.ai generates 3D worlds at scale and high-fidelity synthetic datasets for AI development and beyond. This next-generation capability has use cases across defence, space, mobility and robotics. We believe autonomous systems and computer vision have the opportunity to drastically improve the quality of life for billions of people.

However, one of the hardest problems in building AI for the physical world is that it is difficult for developers to collect the data they require from the real world. Our intelligent tools enable developers to generate and simulate vast 3D worlds to build cutting-edge AI systems to solve the world’s hardest problems. All without the need for 3D expertise.

These tools are used by the world’s most advanced organizations to land a spacecraft on Mars, catch pirates at sea, detect drug-carrying submarines and numerous critical use cases.

At Bifrost, you are backed by Carbide Ventures, Airbus Ventures, Peak XV Partners, Lux Capital, Wavemaker Partners, Cap Vista, Hustle Fund, Champion Hill Ventures and other prominent investors. Your teammates hail from Google, Meta, nuTonomy, Motional, Medios, NVIDIA, GovTech, Lucasfilm, Industrial Light & Magic, Grab, TAIGER, Arup, The Parentinc and other game-changing companies.




WHY BIFROST?👌

🌎 Build captivating and photorealistic 3D worlds

🤩 Bring the bleeding edge of research in AI, GANs, 3D graphics into production

💻 Learn about AI, defence, space, gaming, metaverse, mobility, and robotics

🧑‍🚀 World-class team, investors, advisors and customers

🧘‍♀️ Flexible and hybrid environment with no red tape/bureaucracy

🏛 Trendy shophouse office in CBD near great restaurants and bars

🦾 Committed to helping you grow personally and professionally

🌈 Inclusive, judgement-free and a safe space to be yourself

🛠 Take ownership and build your skillset

🤡 Safe space to share dank memes

🚀 Fast growing company!




🎮 STRATEGY ANALYST INTERNSHIP




🏋️‍♂️ YOUR MAIN QUEST

We're looking for a generalist with a strong operational work ethic, fun personality, curiosity, and a desire to learn how to scale the different functions of a rapidly scaling startup. You will be working directly with the Head of Strategy & Operations and gain significant exposure to the CEO & CTO. This role is a particularly good fit for those aiming to build a career in Management Consulting, Venture Capital, and Entrepreneurship. An ideal candidate will enjoy assignments in the following domains and appreciate the intellectual diversity that comes with it:

 - Strategy - Conduct research on the Physical AI landscape and target customer verticals to inform decision making

 - Sales - Assist in building CRMs, client materials, customer success, and commercial project management

 - Finance - Assist with Fundraising, Investor Relations, FP&A, and Grant Applications

 - Marketing - Bolster efforts across social media marketing, content creation, website design and lead generation

 - Communications - Assist in the creation of materials for internal audiences (employees) and external audiences (PR)

 - People & Talent - Assist in establishing processes for internal talent management and talent acquisition

 - Operations - Ad-hoc projects as and when they arise
   
   


📜 REQUIREMENTS

 - Proficient in MS Office, Google Suite, and willing to learn AI tools (like ChatGPT)

 - Bachelor or Masters Degree from a Top School in - Economics, Finance, Strategy or Computer Science. (Other majors can also apply)

 - Students from any year of their respective program are encouraged to apply

 - Prior internships experiences in Startups, VC, IB, PE, and Consulting are a plus

 - Leadership positions and active participation in extra-curricular activities and clubs focused on Business and Technology is a plus

 - A positive attitude, desire to learn, ability to juggle multiple projects and willingness to put in the hours is highly prized

 - You are a fun person with interests (wh

source_jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR PLATFORM ENGINEER

Bifrost is building technology that gives AI the fastest path to understanding the physical world. We work at the frontier of AI and robotics - our customers use our products to land spacecraft, detect threats across oceans, and train autonomous systems in minutes instead of months.

We are looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to drive the design and delivery of scalable, high-quality software systems. You will guide engineering and infrastructure decisions, and work closely with product teams to turn complex requirements into reliable solutions.




📜 CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Lead design and delivery of our simulation platform’s infrastructure

 - Act as the bridge between Founders, product, engineering, sales, and end users. Translate product requirements into scalable technical solutions

 - Write and review code, moving comfortably across the full stack. Here is what we use:
   
   - Web: React, with Typescript
   
   - Backend: Python, Postgres, Temporal
   
   - Engine: Unreal Engine
   
   - Infra: AWS (with Terraform), Kubernetes (with Helm and ArgoCD)

 - Raise the team’s technical bar




🛠️ QUALIFICATIONS

 - You are based in Singapore

 - You have development, architecture, and administration experience with AWS and Kubernetes

 - You have solid fundamentals in modern fullstack web development and SaaS architecture patterns

 - You are comfortable with using AI to accelerate your research and development

 - You have strong opinions on product strategy and design




✨ BONUS

Highlight to us if you have any experience with

 - Game engines: Unity, Unreal Engine

 - Rendering APIs: OpenGL, Vulkan, DirectX

 - Simulation platforms: Blender, NVIDIA Omniverse, Isaac Sim

 - Rendering pipelines, 3D math, scene composition, lighting, and materials

 - AI/ML systems in research or applied settings

 - Computer Vision-based products

 - Computer vision datasets (COCO, KITTI, etc.)

 - Integrating data pipelines into ML training workflows




🏄‍♀️ WHAT IT'S LIKE WORKING WITH US

Enjoy a focused, dedicated working environment where we never forget how to have a bit of fun! Take the opportunity to do projects outside of your comfort zone - that's where the greatest learning happens. We love out-of-the-box thinkers and problem-solvers who relish sharing, collaboration and growth.

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Member of Technical Staff to design and build the systems that power Bifrost's simulation and synthetic data platform. You'll own significant parts of the stack, from infrastructure and backend services to frontend and developer-facing tooling.

This isn't a role where you'll be handed a spec. You'll be expected to identify what needs building, make architectural decisions, and ship production systems that serve some of the most demanding technical teams in the world.




🌍 YOUR MAIN QUEST

Build technology that gives AI the fastest path to understanding the physical world. Our customers use Bifrost to land spacecraft, detect threats across oceans, and train autonomous systems in minutes instead of months. You'll be the kind of engineer who makes that possible.

 - Own and ship entire systems end-to-end, from problem definition to production

 - Make architecture and design decisions that shape the platform's direction

 - Move comfortably between infrastructure, backend, and frontend work depending on what's needed

 - Work directly with internal stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions

 - Raise the engineering bar through code quality, tooling improvements, and mentorship




📜 CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and build production systems across the full stack: infrastructure, backend services, APIs, and user-facing applications

 - Architect and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS (Kubernetes, containerized workloads, GPU compute, auto-scaling)

 - Build and improve CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, and developer tooling

 - Develop backend services and data pipelines (Python, TypeScript/Node.js, Go)

 - Design and maintain relational database schemas

 - Build responsive frontends and developer-facing interfaces when the work calls for it

 - Debug and resolve production issues across distributed systems

 - Implement observability, monitoring, and reliability practices

 - Use modern AI coding tools effectively to ship faster without sacrificing quality

 - Location: Singapore




🛠️ WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of professional software engineering experience

 - Strong generalist mindset — you've worked across infrastructure, backend, and frontend, and you're comfortable picking up whatever's needed

 - Deep experience with at least two of: Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Go, C++

 - Solid understanding of cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and deployment at scale

 - Strong fundamentals in system design, data modeling, and API architecture

 - Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL

 - Evidence of high ownership — you've shipped and maintained systems, not just contributed features

 - Clear, direct communication — you write well and explain technical decisions simply




✨ YOU'LL STAND OUT IF YOU HAVE

 - Experience in autonomous systems, robotics, simulation, or physical AI

 - Background at a company building self-driving vehicles, drones, defense systems, or robotics platforms

 - Experience with game engines (Unreal Engine, Unity), rendering pipelines, or 3D tooling

 - Exposure to computer vision, synthetic data pipelines, or ML/AI training workflows

 - Experience with GPU compute workloads and real-time rendering infrastructure

 - Background at a high-caliber engineering organization (top tech companies, well-regarded startups, or research labs)




WHY BIFROST?

 - Work at the frontier of AI and robotics with the most technical teams in the world

 - Small team, no red tape. Your work ships to production and directly impacts customers like NASA, Anduril, Honda, and ST Engineering

 - Real ownership — take charge and see the direct impact of your work

 - Inclusive, judgement-free and safe space to be yourself




🏄‍♀️ WHAT IT'S LIKE WORKING WITH US

Enjoy a focused, dedicated working environment where we never forget how to have a bit of fun! Take the opportunity to do

notes: AI-focused startup with a strong engineering core, building simulation and synthetic data platforms.
